title: New garden theme
summary: I've built a new theme for this site, inspired by my love of gardening as well as one of my favourite video games. With no pixel artistry skills to speak of, I'm grateful to the various artists over on itch.io , who I've credited on the about page, for all their lovely creations!
content:
I've built a new theme for this site, inspired by my love of gardening as well as one of my favourite video games.
With no pixel artistry skills to speak of, I'm grateful to the various artists over on itch.io, who I've credited on the about page, for all their lovely creations!
